sections.paragraph:
m. adj.-

(1) prompt, ready, prepared (Syriac and Arabic id.); followed by לְ Est 3:14 8:13 Job 15:24.

(2) exercised, skilful (Germ. fertig); followed by an infin. Job 3:8. Compare عتد Conj. V., to be very skilful in an art; see Schult. on the passage.

Plur. עֲתִידֹות-(a) the things which are ready for any one; i.e. impending, destined, Deu 32:35.-(b) things which one has acquired, i.e. wealth; τὰ ὑπάρχοντα, Isa 10:13.
